label.description: Label is the stable label for the referenced artifact.

value.description: Value is the rendered identifier or path value.

path.description: Path is the artifact path when the reference points to a file.

content_type.description: ContentType reports how Content should be rendered in the UI resource. It is omitted from append-only event lines and only populated by the timeline read model when it resolves a referenced file.

content.description: Content is the resolved artifact file payload for UI tabs when the reference points at a readable file. It is omitted from append-only event lines and only populated by the timeline read model.

TimelineArtifactRef.description: TimelineArtifactRef points at one existing harness-owned artifact or identifier related to a timeline event.

key.description: Key is the stable label for the detail.

value.description: Value is the rendered detail value.

TimelineDetail.description: TimelineDetail is one small display-ready fact carried on a timeline event.

event_id.description: EventID is the stable identifier for this event within one plan timeline.

sequence.description: Sequence is the monotonically increasing event sequence for the plan.

recorded_at.description: RecordedAt is the event creation timestamp.

kind.description: Kind groups related event families such as lifecycle, review, or evidence.

command.description: Command is the harness command that produced the event.

summary.description: Summary is the concise human-readable command outcome.

plan_path.description: PlanPath is the tracked or archived plan path associated with this event.

plan_stem.description: PlanStem is the durable plan stem associated with this event.

revision.description: Revision is the plan-local revision associated with this event.

from_node.description: FromNode is the canonical workflow node before the command when known.

to_node.description: ToNode is the canonical workflow node after the command when known.

synthetic.description: Synthetic reports that this entry is a read-model bootstrap row derived from durable plan or state data rather than a line from `events.jsonl`.

details.description: Details lists small, display-ready event facts without duplicating full underlying artifact payloads.

artifact_refs.description: ArtifactRefs points at high-signal existing harness artifacts related to the event.

input.description: Input is the raw JSON input payload when the command accepted one.

output.description: Output is the raw JSON command result payload.

artifacts.description: Artifacts is the raw JSON artifact payload associated with the event.

TimelineEvent.description: TimelineEvent is one append-only line in `.local/harness/plans/<plan-stem>/events.jsonl`.

title: Timeline event artifact line
description: One append-only JSONL event line from `.local/harness/plans/<plan-stem>/events.jsonl`.
